name: Bitwarden
description: Bitwarden open-source password manager and credential vault for teams

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Bitwarden Web Vault
2. Go to your Organization > Settings > API Key
3. Copy the Client ID and Client Secret
4. For Server Region: enter bitwarden.com (US), bitwarden.eu (EU), or your self-hosted domain

credentialFields.label: Server Region
credentialFields.helpText: Select US or EU, or type your self-hosted domain (e.g. bitwarden.company.com)

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: Organization API client ID from Bitwarden Web Vault > Organization > Settings > API Key.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists Bitwarden organization members to verify credential vault access

checks.name: Secure Secrets
checks.description: Verifies Bitwarden credential vault is active and accessible

checks.name: 2FA
checks.description: Verifies all Bitwarden organization members have two-factor authentication enabled
